title: S3 public access controls disabled
risk: A storage bucket could be exposed publicly.
remediation: Enable S3 Block Public Access and review bucket policies.

title: SSH open to the internet
risk: Attackers can attempt remote access from any public IP address.
remediation: Restrict SSH to approved CIDR ranges or use a safer access pattern.

title: Wildcard IAM permissions
risk: Overly broad permissions increase blast radius if credentials are compromised.
remediation: Replace wildcard actions and resources with least-privilege permissions.

title: Missing storage encryption
risk: Data may not meet expected protection requirements at rest.
remediation: Enable server-side encryption for the bucket.
